zh_TW: 巴克
en: Buck

zh_TW: 請問，你是巴克先生嗎？我是科學院派來的調研員。指派信上說，要在月台找一位巴克先生...
en: Excuse me, are you Mr. Buck? I'm a researcher sent by the academy. The assignment letter said to find a Mr. Buck at the platform...

zh_TW: {{Persistence.data.player_name}}遞出一封沾了點水氣的信件
en: {{Persistence.data.player_name}} hands over a slightly damp letter

zh_TW: 巴克連信都沒接，只是斜眼掃了一下信封上的學院紅印，緩緩吐出一口煙
en: Buck doesn't even take the letter, just glances at the academy's red seal on the envelope and slowly exhales a puff of smoke

zh_TW: 我就是巴克，這封信在城裡可能很有分量，但在翠嶺谷，它連拿來墊桌腳都嫌太薄。
en: I am Buck. This letter might be important in the city, but here in Emerald Valley, it's too thin to even use as a table leg.

zh_TW: 聽著，大學生。市長讓我來接你是因為他還抱著一絲幻想，但我看你這細皮嫩肉的樣子，這兒的雨兩天就能把你淋感冒。
en: Listen, college student. The mayor sent me to pick you up because he's still holding onto a glimmer of hope, but looking at your delicate skin, the rain here will have you catching a cold in two days.

zh_TW: 行李拎好，跟我走，別指望我會幫你拿那箱廢鐵。
en: Pack your luggage, follow me, and don't expect me to help you carry that box of scrap metal.

zh_TW: 喂！那個拿著信封在那晃的！你以為這兒是大城市嗎？，隨便亂走不怕掉坑裡啊！
en: Hey! You with the envelope! Do you think this is a big city? Walking around like that, aren't you afraid of falling into a pit!

zh_TW: {{Persistence.data.player_name}}停下腳步，轉頭看著巴克
en: {{Persistence.data.player_name}} stops and turns to look at Buck

zh_TW: 你是巴克先生？我以為你會在車站外面等我呢。這是學院給我的指派信，上面寫著...
en: Are you Mr. Buck? I thought you would be waiting for me outside the station. This is the assignment letter from the academy, it says...

zh_TW: 巴克快步走近，粗魯地打斷
en: Buck quickly approaches and rudely interrupts

zh_TW: 信上寫什麼我一點興趣都沒有。\n在這兒，我們看的是十字鎬流了多少汗，不是看你的信封印章有多紅。
en: I have no interest in what's written on the letter. Here, we look at how much sweat you've put into your pickaxe, not how red your letter seal is.

zh_TW: 我是工頭巴克，市長讓我來領你這個『法師老爺』。
en: I'm Foreman Buck, the mayor sent me to pick you up, you 'mage lord'.

zh_TW: 把那封信收起來吧，揉爛了這裡可沒有導師給你補發。\n這兒沒馬車，腳步跟緊點，要是迷失在霧裡，我可不會回頭找你。
en: Put that letter away, if you crumple it up, there's no tutor here to reissue it for you. There's no carriage here, keep up with me, if you get lost in the fog, I won't turn back to find you.

zh_TW: 喲，這不是那個……『大學生』嗎？怎麼，觀測站的床太硬睡不著，這麼早就跑出來散步了？
en: Yo, isn't this the... 'college student'? What's wrong, can't sleep on the hard bed at the observatory, going out for a walk so early?

zh_TW: 巴克先生，我有名字的，我叫{{Persistence.data.player_name}}。
en: Mr. Buck, I have a name, it's {{Persistence.data.player_name}}.

zh_TW: 隨便啦，對我來說你們這群穿白袍的都長得差不多。\n聽著，大學生，我不管你在鎮上東摸西摸想幹嘛，只要別擋著礦車的路，我也沒興趣管你。
en: Whatever, to me you guys in white robes all look the same. Listen, college student, I don't care what you do around town as long as you don't block the minecart tracks, I have no interest in you.

zh_TW: 我是在紀錄魔力紊亂的頻率，這對礦區安全有幫助的...
en: I'm recording the frequency of magical disturbances, it's helpful for mine safety...

zh_TW: 省省吧。以前也有人說過一樣的話，結果呢？除了炸掉我們半條礦道，什麼也沒留下。
en: Spare me. Someone said the same thing before, and what happened? Besides blowing up half of our mine, it didn't leave anything behind.

zh_TW: 反正你們這些法師老爺，大概不出一個禮拜就會受不了這裡的爛天氣跟硬麵包，捲鋪蓋滾回你的象牙塔了。
en: Anyway, you 'mage lords' probably won't last a week here with the lousy weather and hard bread, you'll pack up and roll back to your ivory tower.

zh_TW: 在那之前，管好你那根木棍，別給我們添亂。走開，纜繩重得很！
en: Before that, take care of your stick and don't cause trouble for us. Move along, the cable is heavy!

zh_TW: 巴克說完便轉身離開，嘴裡還細聲咕噥著。
en: Buck says this and then turns around to leave, muttering under his breath.

zh_TW: {{Persistence.data.player_name}}？嘖，名字取得倒好聽，反正過幾天就沒人記得了...
en: {{Persistence.data.player_name}}? Tsk, the name sounds nice, but no one will remember it in a few days anyway...

zh_TW: 別靠過來，你身上的藥劑味會干擾我判斷礦石的聲音。\n去去去，回你的塔裡玩泥巴去。
en: Don't come near me, the smell of potions on you will interfere with my judgment of the sound of the ore. Go, go, go, go back to your tower and play with mud.

zh_TW: 怎麼？大學生，還沒收拾行李啊？火車票可是不等人喔。
en: What's wrong? College student, haven't packed your luggage yet? The train ticket won't wait for you, you know.

zh_TW: 喂，大學生，你要去東邊森林？\n那邊最近不平靜，你自己看著辦，我可沒空去撈你。
en: Hey, college student, you're going to the forest in the east? It's been unstable there recently, you can do as you please, I don't have time to go rescue you.

zh_TW: {{Persistence.data.player_name}}，過來一下。這塊礦石上面的紋路不太對勁，你那個什麼『共鳴核心』能不能幫忙看一下？
en: {{Persistence.data.player_name}}, come here for a moment. The pattern on this ore looks strange, can your 'resonance core' help take a look?

zh_TW: 咳，我只是不想浪費體力去挖廢礦而已，別想太多。
en: Cough, I just don't want to waste my energy digging up worthless ore, don't read too much into it.

zh_TW: 今天食堂有燉牛肉，去晚了就只剩骨頭了。\n看你瘦得跟竹竿一樣，別還沒查出真相就先餓暈了。
en: Today's cafeteria has stewed beef, if you go late there will only be bones left. You look as skinny as a stick, don't faint from hunger before you even find out the truth.

zh_TW: 老實說，我以前覺得法師都是廢物...
en: To be honest, I used to think mages were all useless...

zh_TW: 但你不太一樣。你這傢伙……硬頸的程度快趕上我們礦工了。
en: But you're a bit different. You... have a stubbornness that almost rivals us miners.

zh_TW: 如果哪天你真的把這片山谷修好了，我親自開火車送你回學院顯擺...
en: If one day you really fix this valley, I'll personally drive the train to show off when taking you back to the academy...

zh_TW: 不過，到時候你可能捨不得走了吧？哈哈！
en: But by then, you might not want to leave, right? Haha!
